meta.loginDescription: Sign in to your Insight account
meta.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for your Insight account

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Welcome back, please enter your login details

error.emailNotConfirmed: Your email address has not been confirmed. Please check your inbox for the confirmation email.
error.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

register.title: Create a new account
register.subtitle: Fill in the information below to get started
register.termsAgreementPrefix: I have read and agree to the

success.title: Registration successful!
success.emailSent: We've sent a confirmation email to {email}. Please click the link in the email to verify your account.
success.clickLink: Click the confirmation link in the email

error.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
error.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match

success.title: Email verified successfully!
success.description: Your email has been confirmed. You can now sign in to your account.

error.title: Verification failed
error.accessDenied: The verification link was denied. Please try again.
error.expiredToken: The verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
error.invalidToken: The verification link is invalid. Please check your email for the correct link.
error.default: An error occurred during verification. Please try again.

resendVerification.title: Resend verification email
resendVerification.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a new verification link.

success.title: Verification email sent!
success.description: We've sent a new verification email to {email}. Please check your inbox.

error.default: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

success.title: Reset email sent!
success.description: We've sent a password reset link to {email}. Please check your inbox.

error.default: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

success.title: Password reset successful!
success.description: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

invalidLink.title: Invalid or expired link
invalidLink.description: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

error.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
error.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match
error.default: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
